mapper.update: UPDATE ADM_LOGIN_INFO SET last_login_at = NOW() WHERE admin_id = #{adminId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ADM_LOGIN_HIST (admin_id, login_rslt_cd, fail_rsn_cd, login_ip, user_agent) VALUES (#{adminId}, #{loginRsltCd}, #{failRsnCd}, #{loginIp}, #{userAgent})
mapper.update: UPDATE ADM_LOGIN_INFO SET admin_pw = #{adminPw}, update_ts = NOW() WHERE admin_id = #{adminId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BRD_POST_MST WHERE del_yn = 'N' AND DATE(create_ts) = CURDATE()
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BRD_POST_MST WHERE del_yn = 'N'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BRD_POST_MST WHERE del_yn = 'N' AND approval_yn = 'N'
SELECT code_grp_id, code_id, code_nm, code_nm_en, use_yn, sort_ord, etc_val1, etc_val2, remark FROM COM_CODE_DTL WHERE code_grp_id = #{codeGrpId} AND use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY sort_ord

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BRD_POST_MST p LEFT JOIN MEM_JOIN_INFO m ON m.member_no = p.member_no WHERE p.del_yn = 'N'
AND p.board_gbn_cd = #{boardGbnCd}
AND p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND m.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND (p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') OR m.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%'))
mapper.update: UPDATE BRD_POST_MST SET approval_yn = IF(approval_yn = 'Y', 'N', 'Y'), approval_at = IF(approval_yn = 'N', NOW(), NULL) WHERE post_no = #{postNo}
UPDATE BRD_POST_MST SET del_yn = 'Y', del_ts = NOW() WHERE post_no = #{postNo}
UPDATE BRD_POST_COMMENT SET del_yn = 'Y', del_ts = NOW() WHERE comment_no = #{commentNo} AND del_yn = 'N'
UPDATE BRD_POST_MST SET comment_cnt = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BRD_POST_COMMENT WHERE post_no = #{postNo} AND del_yn = 'N') WHERE post_no = #{postNo}
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MEM_JOIN_INFO WHERE 1=1
AND (email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') OR nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%'))
